text.title: AI-Assisted Lessons-Learned Synthesis Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; theme with 0 evidence quotes; owner_role='team' is forbidden generic value; action_items < 5.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: theme with recurrence_count < 2 in main themes list
evidence_quotes[].verbatim_text not appearing in source_doc at line_range
action_item with deadline > 1 quarter from finalized_at
